creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello!

portclippy Makefile shows a better block order:
---
# PORTNAME block
PORTNAME
DISTVERSIONPREFIX
DISTVERSION
PORTREVISION
CATEGORIES
PKGNAMESUFFIX

# Maintainer block
MAINTAINER
COMMENT

# License block
LICENSE
LICENSE_FILE

# USES block
USEShat?
USE_GITHUB
GH_ACCOUNT

# Make block
+MAKE_ENV

# Standard bsd.port.mk variables
NO_ARCH

# Packaging list block
INFO

-MAKE_ENV

PLIST_FILES
+PORTDOCS

# Options definitions
OPTIONS_DEFINE

-PORTDOCS
---

Could you please check that?
